title: gesneria scabra subsp. sphaerocarpa
intro: Gesneria scabra subsp. sphaerocarpa, also known as the rounded fruit gesneria, is a plant species within the gesneriaceae family. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Gesneria scabra subsp. sphaerocarpa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations involving this plant are often made by infusing its leaves or roots in water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds, which can then be consumed as a tea or applied topically.
